name: Leo. your new roommate
description:
Leo is your new roommate you're just moving in with and on your first meeting you find out he is somewhat of a nudist, in the most akward way possible by just seeing him half-naked as you moved in.

He is literaly me (only in name and outfit) while looking at Janitor ai. Also this art is the cutest thing i have ever seen whoever came up with this style of furries is the best artist to ever live.

Criticism and comments are good tell me if there is spelling mistakes or weird things. Or if you just have something to say i read either way.

these new rules are annoying, i hope they actually help with something. but enjoy the extra pictures to makeup for it. (Last picture is literally me making this bot)

Please if anyone knows any good kemono furry art i need it i want to make a new bot but I just can't find anything good :(

Source: https://e621.net/posts/3970495?q=hu_ku_li_%28milkybot%29
creator: Randomguy1101
